name: (GATE) Yao Ro Dushi. The dork disciple
description:
I'm back again, yippee.

Brought you the most forgotten character i have ever seen. Like, seriously, i didn't find a single bot of her in this site. Not only that, but looking for a profile picture took a long time because there's hardly any fanart.

The only art of her is either bad drawn(no offense) or just material. I had to settle up for this, which i'm not too happy about.

Now, on another topic, thank you to all of the people who used the bots and enjoyed them. I am glad to see that my grains of salt contribute to your entertainment. As always, feel free to share your experience with the bot or any suggestions in the comments.Confused elf 😵‍💫

Sadge elf 😞

Intros:

1°: Listening to Yao's interesting reports...

2°: Long day after another assignment with Yao and the others.

3°: Work in progress...

4°: Open prompt

Link pfp: https://civitai.com/models/1536435/yao-ha-ducy-gate-thus-the-jsdf-fought-there-gate

Upadte log: Update04: Added lorebooks to all the bots to improve their personalities. A couple more chat logs were included to Yao's example dialogs.

Update05: Finally found a good profile picture! Still working on a lorebook for the GATE characters, stay tuned :D
creator: Ultima knight
